AI.result: 发现系统在热淬火后表现出明显的动力学阻滞，表现为自旋自相关函数中存在指数级长寿命的非热平台。这是短程相互作用、无无序系统中罕见的动力学阻滞现象。阻滞动力学源于自旋-3/2冰特有的复合激发结构和需要激活过程的受约束弛豫路径。
AI.conclusion: 更高自旋冰系统为实现非常规库仑自旋液体和无淬火无序的动力学阻滞提供了肥沃平台。自旋-3/2冰中更大的局域希尔伯特空间产生了新的复合激发结构，这些结构显著改变了系统的动力学行为，导致了独特的阻滞现象。

title: Self-foaming, Sintering-resistant Iron-Tungsten Powders Enable High-Cycle Thermochemical Hydrogen Storage
summary: H2-H2O redox cycling of iron powder beds at 650-800 °C offers a compact, safe, economical hydrogen storage method, but sintering-induced capacity loss has stalled its scalability for decades. Here, we show that adding redox-active tungsten to Fe powders solves this problem in static powder beds: Fe-25W (at%) alloyed powder self-foams during redox cycling via W gas-phase transport, increasing porosity and preserving capacity. In a custom automated reactor, a kilogram-scale powder bed reversibly stores 42g H2 and sustains 96+/-3% capacity utilization over 30 redox cycles. Temperature-resolved in-situ X-ray diffraction reveals a chemical-vapor-transport-mediated self-foaming mechanism that redistributes W to refine the microstructure, complemented by a contact-barrier stabilization mechanism during high-temperature holds. Partial-capacity cycling up to 90 cycles further confirms sintering resistance under incomplete redox conditions. These results establish Fe-W powder beds as a robust, scalable, and compact platform for safe, stationary hydrogen storage.

AI.tldr: Fe-W合金粉末通过化学气相传输自发泡沫化，解决了铁基氢储存材料烧结导致的容量衰减问题，实现了千克级可逆储氢和长期循环稳定性。
AI.motivation: 铁粉床在650-800°C下通过H2-H2O氧化还原循环实现紧凑、安全、经济的氢储存，但烧结导致的容量损失阻碍了其规模化应用数十年。
AI.method: 在铁粉中添加氧化还原活性钨（Fe-25W at%），利用钨的气相传输机制使合金粉末在氧化还原循环中自发泡沫化，增加孔隙率并保持容量。使用定制自动化反应器进行千克级测试，并通过温度分辨原位X射线衍射揭示自泡沫化机制。
AI.result: 千克级粉末床可逆储存42g氢气，在30次氧化还原循环中保持96±3%的容量利用率。部分容量循环90次进一步证实了烧结抗性。温度分辨原位X射线衍射揭示了化学气相传输介导的自泡沫化机制和接触屏障稳定机制。
AI.conclusion: Fe-W粉末床为安全、固定的氢储存提供了一个稳健、可扩展且紧凑的平台，解决了长期存在的烧结问题。

title: Phonons reflect dynamic spin-state order in LaCoO$_3$
summary: We investigate lattice dynamics in LaCoO$_3$ using inelastic neutron and x-ray scattering over $T = 2\mbox{-}650\,\mathrm{K}$, spanning the spin-state crossover at $T_{1} \approx 100\,\mathrm{K}$ and the insulator--metal transition at $T_{2} \approx 550\,\mathrm{K}$. Comparison with quasi-harmonic $ab-initio$ lattice-dynamical calculations helps reveal anomalous softening of a $\approx 10\,\mathrm{meV}$ oxygen phonon, confined to the temperature interval $T_{1} \leq T \leq T_{2}$ and localized in momentum space at $\boldsymbol{q}_{\mathrm{SSO}} = \left( \frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2},\frac{1}{2} \right)_{c}$. This wave vector corresponds to the spin-state ordering originally proposed by Goodenough [J. Phys. Chem. Solids 6, 287-297 (1958)]. Our results therefore provide momentum-resolved evidence for dynamic correlations of high-spin and low-spin Co$^{3+}$ states in LaCoO$_{3}$, linking spin-state fluctuations to anomalous phonon renormalization.

AI.tldr: 通过非弹性中子和X射线散射研究LaCoO₃晶格动力学，发现10 meV氧声子在T₁到T₂温度区间异常软化，动量空间局域于q_SSO=(1/2,1/2,1/2)，为高自旋和低自旋Co³⁺态的动态关联提供了动量分辨证据。
AI.motivation: 研究LaCoO₃在自旋态交叉(T₁≈100K)和绝缘体-金属转变(T₂≈550K)温度范围内的晶格动力学，探索自旋态波动与声子重整化之间的关联。
AI.method: 使用非弹性中子和X射线散射在2-650K温度范围内测量，结合准谐波ab-initio晶格动力学计算进行比较分析。
AI.result: 发现约10 meV氧声子在T₁≤T≤T₂温度区间异常软化，动量空间局域于q_SSO=(1/2,1/2,1/2)，该波矢对应Goodenough提出的自旋态有序化。
AI.conclusion: 结果为LaCoO₃中高自旋和低自旋Co³⁺态的动态关联提供了动量分辨证据，将自旋态波动与异常声子重整化联系起来。

title: Surface-localized topological superconductivity in nodal-loop materials: BdG analysis
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to the Proceedings of the 38th International Symposium on Superconductivity (ISS2025); revised manuscript under review
summary: We theoretically study surface superconductivity in a nodal-line semimetal by combining a minimal tight-binding model with a layer-resolved Bogoliubov-de Gennes approach. In the normal state, the model realizes a bulk nodal loop and an associated drumhead surface band in a slab geometry with open boundaries in the $z$ direction: the central layers reproduce the bulk-like density of states, whereas the surface layer exhibits a sharp zero-energy peak originating from the drumhead states. On top of this band structure we introduce chiral $p$-wave and $d_{x^2-y^2}$-wave superconducting channels and determine the layer-dependent gap amplitudes self-consistently. The chiral $p$-wave order parameter is strongly enhanced at the outermost layers and decays within only a few layers towards the interior, while the $d$-wave order parameter is more than an order of magnitude smaller on all layers. The quasiparticle dispersion and surface local density of states in the chiral $p$-wave state show that the drumhead band is efficiently gapped out and that the zero-energy peak in the normal surface spectrum is split into two coherence peaks, directly reflecting the induced superconducting gap. These results demonstrate that superconductivity driven by drumhead surface states is naturally biased toward a surface-localized chiral $p$-wave pairing symmetry and may offer qualitative guidance for interpreting surface-sensitive experiments on Pd-doped CaAgP.

AI.tldr: 研究节点线半金属中表面超导性，发现鼓面表面态会自然偏向表面局域的手性p波配对对称性
AI.motivation: 探索节点线半金属中表面超导性的配对对称性选择机制，特别是鼓面表面态如何影响超导配对
AI.method: 结合最小紧束缚模型与层分辨的Bogoliubov-de Gennes方法，自洽计算层依赖的能隙振幅
AI.result: 手性p波序参量在最外层显著增强并在几层内衰减，而d波序参量在所有层都小一个数量级；鼓面能带被有效打开能隙
AI.conclusion: 鼓面表面态驱动的超导性自然偏向表面局域的手性p波配对对称性，为Pd掺杂CaAgP的表面敏感实验提供理论指导

title: Extrinsic Spin Splitter Currents in Altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets exhibit momentum-dependent spin splitting despite having zero net magnetization. This enables a spin-splitter effect in which an external electric field generates transverse spin currents by separating oppositely polarized carriers. Here, we develop a unified semiclassical theory of linear extrinsic spin-splitter currents, incorporating impurity-induced side-jump and skew-scattering contributions, and apply it to the $d$-wave altermagnet \ch{FeSb2}. We demonstrate that asymmetric impurity scattering provides a dominant channel for spin-splitter currents. Remarkably, the resulting extrinsic spin conductivity is time-reversal even, in contrast to previously studied spin-splitter responses arising from symmetric scattering.

AI.tldr: 提出统一半经典理论解释d波交变磁体FeSb2中的线性外禀自旋分流效应，揭示不对称杂质散射是主要机制
AI.motivation: 交变磁体具有动量依赖的自旋分裂但净磁化为零，这使其能够通过外部电场分离相反自旋极化的载流子产生横向自旋电流。需要建立统一理论来解释这种自旋分流效应
AI.method: 发展统一的线性外禀自旋分流电流半经典理论，包含杂质诱导的侧跳和偏斜散射贡献，并将其应用于d波交变磁体FeSb2
AI.result: 不对称杂质散射是自旋分流电流的主要通道，由此产生的外禀自旋电导率是时间反演偶的，与之前研究的对称散射产生的自旋分流响应不同
AI.conclusion: 建立了交变磁体中自旋分流效应的完整理论框架，揭示了不对称杂质散射的关键作用，为理解这类材料中的自旋输运提供了新视角

title: Substrate induced optimization of the Electrocatalytic Hydrogen Evolution Reaction (HER) performances of MoS2 thin film
summary: Molybdenum disulfide (MoS2) has emerged as a promising, cost-effective catalyst for hydrogen production via water splitting. We investigate the structural and electrocatalytic properties of MoS2 thin films deposited on different substrates (Al2O3, SiC, STO) to study their hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) activity. In particular, in order to study the substrate influence on the stabilization of different polymorphic MoS2 phases, the films are synthesised using pulsed laser deposition on substrates with different crystal symmetries and lattice parameters. All the deposited samples are characterized by X-Ray Diffraction, Raman Spectroscopy, Linear Sweep Voltammetry and Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy analyses. The films grown on Al2O3 substrates exhibit the best HER performance, likely due to the stabilization of the metastable 1T phase through the interfacial interactions between film and substrate. Presence of the 1T phase in the samples grown on Al2O3 improves the charge transfer efficiency and the electrochemically active surface with a better response to the applied potential, demonstrating their enhanced catalytic behaviour for hydrogen evolution.

AI.tldr: 研究不同衬底（Al2O3、SiC、STO）上沉积的MoS2薄膜的结构与电催化性能，发现Al2O3衬底能稳定1T相，从而获得最佳析氢反应性能。
AI.motivation: MoS2作为一种有前景的析氢反应催化剂，其性能受衬底影响显著。研究不同衬底如何稳定MoS2的不同多晶型相，特别是1T相，对优化催化剂性能至关重要。
AI.method: 采用脉冲激光沉积在不同晶体对称性和晶格参数的衬底（Al2O3、SiC、STO）上制备MoS2薄膜，通过X射线衍射、拉曼光谱、线性扫描伏安法和电化学阻抗谱进行表征。
AI.result: Al2O3衬底上生长的薄膜表现出最佳的析氢反应性能，这归因于界面相互作用稳定了亚稳态的1T相，提高了电荷转移效率和电化学活性表面积。
AI.conclusion: 衬底选择对MoS2催化剂的性能有决定性影响，Al2O3衬底通过稳定1T相显著提升析氢反应活性，为设计高效催化剂提供了重要指导。

title: Quantum magnetic phase transitions in a Kugel-Khomskii model including spin-orbit coupling
summary: Using the formalism of pseudospin and isospin operators the Hamiltonian of an effective Kugel-Khomskii model with spin-orbit coupling is derived with an exact account of the $t_{2g}$ multiplet splitting by the crystal field. An analytical solution is obtained for an arbitrary relation between the Hubbard repulsion and crystal field splitting, i.e., interpolating the cases of Mott-Hubbard and charge-transfer insulators. A description of orbital orders is given in terms of octupole moments. The ground-state phase diagram is constructed in the parameter space spanned by spin-orbit coupling, Hund's exchange, and Hubbard interaction. We investigate a quantum phase transition between a state exhibiting hidden magnetic and orbital long-range order and a ferromagnetic state with a reduced magnetic moment accompanied by antiferroorbital order. It is shown that the cooperative effect of Hund's and spin-orbit interactions gives rise to an easy-plane-type anisotropy.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了考虑自旋轨道耦合的有效Kugel-Khomskii模型哈密顿量，获得了任意哈伯德排斥与晶体场分裂关系的解析解，构建了相图并研究了量子相变。
AI.motivation: 研究在自旋轨道耦合、洪德交换和哈伯德相互作用共同作用下，具有t2g多重态晶体场分裂的系统的量子相变和轨道有序行为。
AI.method: 使用赝自旋和同位旋算符形式，推导包含自旋轨道耦合的有效Kugel-Khomskii模型哈密顿量，精确考虑t2g多重态的晶体场分裂，获得解析解。
AI.result: 构建了在自旋轨道耦合、洪德交换和哈伯德相互作用参数空间中的基态相图，发现了隐藏磁性和轨道长程序态与铁磁态之间的量子相变，揭示了洪德和自旋轨道相互作用的协同效应导致易平面型各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 通过精确处理晶体场分裂，获得了连接Mott-Hubbard和电荷转移绝缘体情况的统一描述，用八极矩描述轨道有序，揭示了自旋轨道耦合和洪德交换的协同效应在量子相变中的关键作用。

title: Pressure-induced reentrant superconductivity in a misfit layered compound $\mathrm{(SnS)_{1.15}(TaS_2)}$
summary: Misfit layered compounds are natural van der Waals heterostructures in which electronically active transition-metal dichalcogenide layers are decoupled by incommensurate blocking layers, enabling bulk realization of quasi-two-dimensional quantum states. Here we investigate the superconducting, transport,and structural properties of the misfit compound $\mathrm{(SnS)_{1.15}(TaS_2)}$ under pressures up to 150 GPa. The low-pressure superconducting phase is gradually suppressed and disappears near 14.7 GPa,accompanied by increasing residual resistance. Remarkably, a distinct superconducting phase reemerges above 80 GPa and persists to the highest pressures achieved. This reentrant superconductivity follows a pressure-induced sign reversal of the Hall coefficient near 60 GPa and a nonmonotonic evolution of the normal-state resistance, indicating an electronic reconstruction. No structural phase transition is detected over the entire pressure range. Our results demonstrate a pressure-driven electronic reconstruction leading to reentrant superconductivity in a misfit layered compound, establishing pressure as an effective route to engineer superconductivity and electronic states in natural van der Waals heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 压力诱导的电子重构导致SnS-TaS2错配层化合物中重入超导现象
AI.motivation: 研究错配层化合物(SnS)₁.₁₅(TaS₂)在高压下的超导、输运和结构性质，探索压力对天然范德华异质结中量子态的调控作用
AI.method: 对(SnS)₁.₁₅(TaS₂)施加高达150 GPa的压力，测量其超导、输运和结构性质，包括霍尔系数、正常态电阻和结构相变检测
AI.result: 低压超导相在14.7 GPa附近消失，但在80 GPa以上出现重入超导相并持续到最高压力；霍尔系数在60 GPa附近发生符号反转，正常态电阻呈现非单调演化，但未检测到结构相变
AI.conclusion: 压力驱动的电子重构导致错配层化合物中出现重入超导现象，证明压力是调控天然范德华异质结中超导和电子态的有效途径

title: Electromechanical Switching and Momentum-Selective Transport in Geometry-Defined Blue Phosphorus Homojunctions
summary: Developing intrinsic homojunctions without chemical heterogeneity remains a key challenge in future two - dimensional devices. Here, we report a geometry - defined metal--semiconductor--metal homojunction in bilayer blue phosphorus (BlueP) created by a localized bubble corrugation, without chemical doping or foreign - material interfaces. First - principles calculations show that enlarging the interlayer separation in the metallic A\(_1\)B\(_1\) - stacked BlueP bilayer opens a band gap, enabling a semiconducting barrier embedded between metallic segments. First - principles quantum - transport simulations reveal a crossover from ballistic to tunneling transport upon bubble formation. In the tunneling regime, transmission decreases exponentially with bubble width while remaining weakly sensitive to bubble height and bulging direction. The junction acts as an orientation - dependent \(k\) - space filter, producing transport anisotropy and momentum selectivity. Orbital - resolved scattering analysis shows that intralayer - bonding channels persist under deformation whereas interlayer - hybridized channels are quenched, and that σ- type bonding yields higher conductance than π- type bonding. These insights motivate two electromechanical device concepts: a mechanically switchable memory element with ON/OFF ratios up to 30 and a nanoscale sliding rheostat with reproducible exponential resistance tuning for Å- scale displacement sensing.

AI.tldr: 双层蓝磷中通过气泡褶皱构建几何定义的金属-半导体-金属同质结，无需化学掺杂或异质界面
AI.motivation: 开发不依赖化学异质性的本征同质结是二维器件发展的关键挑战，传统方法需要化学掺杂或异质界面
AI.method: 通过局部气泡褶皱在双层蓝磷中创建几何定义的金属-半导体-金属同质结，利用第一性原理计算和量子输运模拟分析
AI.result: 气泡形成导致从弹道输运到隧穿输运的转变，结作为取向依赖的k空间滤波器，产生输运各向异性和动量选择性
AI.conclusion: 该几何同质结设计启发了两种机电器件概念：机械可开关存储元件和纳米级滑动变阻器，可用于Å尺度位移传感

title: A Comparative Study of Structural Representations for 2D Materials: Insights from Dynamic Collision Fingerprint and Matminer
summary: In materials science, the selection of structural descriptors for machine learning protocols strongly influences predictive performance and the degree of physical interpretability that can be achieved from the derived models. Although more complex descriptors may improve numerical accuracy, they often represent extra computational load, also reducing transparency into the underlying structural information. A framework called the Dynamic Collision Fingerprint (DCF) was recently proposed with the goal of producing concise, physically significant representations, generating descriptors via dynamical probing of atomic structures. In this work, we benchmark DCF using a dataset composed of 120 two-dimensional carbon allotropes and compare its performance with the widely considered Matminer library. The analysis employs three regression models, linear regression, decision tree, and XGBoost, evaluated over train and test partitions ranging from 10\% to 90\% and repeated over multiple random seeds in order to characterize statistical variability. The obtained results demonstrate that DCF easily matches Matminer in terms of predicting accuracy across all learning algorithms. However, it accomplishes this using descriptors that are significantly lower dimensional, pointing to manageable computing costs. Moreover, compared to the rather technical Matminer descriptions, the DCF exhibits considerably clearer physical interpretability. These findings suggest that DCF is a significant substitute for high-dimensional descriptor libraries as structural representation since it is both computationally flexible and physically grounded.

AI.tldr: DCF动态碰撞指纹描述符在预测二维碳同素异形体性质时，与高维Matminer描述符精度相当，但维度更低、计算成本更小、物理可解释性更强。
AI.motivation: 材料科学中，结构描述符的选择对机器学习预测性能和物理可解释性有重要影响。复杂描述符可能提高精度，但会增加计算负担并降低透明度。需要寻找既能保持预测精度又具有良好物理可解释性的简洁描述符。
AI.method: 使用动态碰撞指纹（DCF）框架生成简洁的物理显著描述符，通过动态探测原子结构。在120个二维碳同素异形体数据集上，将DCF与广泛使用的Matminer库进行基准测试。采用线性回归、决策树和XGBoost三种回归模型，在10%到90%的训练/测试划分范围内评估，并通过多次随机种子重复实验以表征统计变异性。
AI.result: DCF在所有学习算法中都能轻松匹配Matminer的预测精度。同时，DCF使用的描述符维度显著更低，计算成本可控。与较为技术性的Matminer描述相比，DCF展现出更清晰的物理可解释性。
AI.conclusion: DCF作为结构表示方法，是替代高维描述符库的重要选择，既具有计算灵活性又具有物理基础。它提供了精度相当但更简洁、更易解释的描述符方案。

title: $Z_3$ confined and deconfined Coulomb liquids in $S_{\rm eff} = 3/2$ pyrochlore magnets
summary: We identify an interesting regime in the physics of pyrochlore magnets in which spin-orbit and crystal field effects lead to {\em two} low-lying magnetic doublets that can be modeled as an effective spin $S=3/2$ degree of freedom that sees a dominant easy-axis antiferromagnetic exchange $J>0$ favoring the local $[111]$ axes, which competes with a comparably strong single-ion anisotropy $Δ= J+μ/2$ (with $|μ| \ll J$) favoring the perpendicular planes. For a precise analysis, we study the $T/J \rightarrow 0$ limit in which $w \equiv \exp(-μ/T)$ is the control variable. In this limit, we find {\em two topologically distinct} zero-field Coulomb phases separated by a first-order $Z_3$ confinement transition at $w_c \approx 2.02$. Both Coulomb phases admit a description in terms of the fluctuations of a coarse-grained divergence-free polarization field. However, the flux of this polarization field is restricted to integer multiples of $3$, and only charges that are multiples of 3 are deconfined in one of these phases, while all integer fluxes are allowed and all integer charges are deconfined in the other phase. Experimental systems with small negative $μ$ ({\em i.e.}, $-J \ll μ< 0$) are therefore predicted to exhibit signatures of this topological transition when cooled below $T_c \approx 1.42|μ|$.

AI.tldr: 在烧绿石磁体中，自旋轨道和晶体场效应产生两个低能磁双峰，形成有效S=3/2自旋系统，其中易轴反铁磁交换与强单离子各向异性竞争，导致两个拓扑不同的零场库仑相被一级Z3禁闭相变分隔。
AI.motivation: 研究烧绿石磁体中自旋轨道和晶体场效应产生的特殊物理机制，探索两个低能磁双峰形成的有效S=3/2自旋系统的相行为，特别是拓扑相变和库仑相的特性。
AI.method: 采用T/J→0极限分析，以w≡exp(-μ/T)为控制变量，研究有效S=3/2自旋系统的相图，其中易轴反铁磁交换J与单离子各向异性Δ=J+μ/2竞争，分析拓扑相变和库仑相的结构。
AI.result: 发现两个拓扑不同的零场库仑相，被一级Z3禁闭相变在w_c≈2.02处分隔。一个相中极化场通量限制为3的整数倍，只有3的倍数的电荷是退禁闭的；另一个相中允许所有整数通量，所有整数电荷都是退禁闭的。
AI.conclusion: 对于μ为小负值的实验系统（-J≪μ<0），当冷却到T_c≈1.42|μ|以下时，预计会表现出这种拓扑相变的特征，为烧绿石磁体的拓扑相变研究提供了新视角。

title: Threefold error in the reported zero-field cooled magnetic moment of single crystal $La_2SmNi_2O_7$
summary: For a relatively long time, the observation of the DC diamagnetic state in highly compressed nickelate superconductors [1],[2] has been a challenging experimental problem. And recently Li et al.[3] reported on the measurements of the DC diamagnetism in zero-field-cooled (ZFC) and field-cooled (FC) pressurized single crystal $La_2SmNi_2O_7$. From the analysis of experimental data, Li et al.[3] reported that the superconducting phase fraction in their $La_2SmNi_2O_7$ sample measured in the ZFC mode is 62.1%, and the superconducting phase fraction in the FC mode is 14.4%. It should be clarified that we regard the measurements of the DC diamagnetic state [3] in $La_2SmNi_2O_7$ (and more recently in $Pr_4Ni_3O_{10}$ [4]) as outstanding experimental results confirming bulk superconductivity in pressurized nickelates. However, we should note that Li et al.[3] made a threefold error in their calculations of the superconducting phase fraction in $La_2SmNi_2O_7$. We believe that correcting this and other errors in Ref.[3] will benefit the physics community.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出Li等人[3]在计算La₂SmNi₂O₇超导相分数时存在三倍误差，需要纠正这一计算错误以利于物理学界。
AI.motivation: 长期以来，高压镍酸盐超导体中直流抗磁态的观测一直是实验难题。Li等人[3]报道了La₂SmNi₂O₇单晶在零场冷却和场冷却模式下的直流抗磁性测量结果，但他们的超导相分数计算存在错误，需要纠正以准确反映实验结果。
AI.method: 通过分析Li等人[3]的实验数据，重新计算La₂SmNi₂O₇样品的超导相分数，指出原计算存在三倍误差。
AI.result: Li等人[3]报道的ZFC模式下超导相分数为62.1%、FC模式下为14.4%存在计算错误，实际数值需要重新计算修正。
AI.conclusion: 虽然La₂SmNi₂O₇和Pr₄Ni₃O₁₀的直流抗磁态测量是确认高压镍酸盐体超导性的重要实验结果，但Li等人[3]的超导相分数计算存在三倍误差，纠正这些错误将有益于物理学界。

title: Growth-controlled photochromism in yttrium oxyhydride thin films deposited by HiPIMS and pulsed-DC magnetron sputtering
summary: The present study investigates photochromic oxygen-containing yttrium hydride (YHO) thin films deposited by reactive high power impulse magnetron sputtering (HiPIMS) and compares their photochromic, optical, and structural properties with those of films synthesized by reactive pulsed direct current magnetron sputtering (pulsed-DCMS). Optical emission spectroscopy reveals that, unlike pulsed-DCMS where Ar$^{+}$ ions dominate, HiPIMS discharges are characterised by strong Y$^{+}$ emission, evidencing high yttrium ionisation and substantial self-sputter recycling. The critical working pressure (P$_c$) required to obtain transparent and photochromic films is higher for HiPIMS (Pc $\approx$ 1.0 Pa) than for pulsed-DCMS (Pc $\approx$ 0.5 Pa). Although films deposited near Pc exhibit similar solar transmittance (~72 %) and lattice parameters (5.38--5.39 Å), the pulsed-DCMS film shows a substantially higher relative photochromic contrast (34 %) and a lower optical band gap (2.70 eV) compared with the HiPIMS film (9 % contrast and 2.94 eV). This difference is partly attributed to a lower oxygen-to-hydrogen atomic ratio in the pulsed-DCMS film. Structurally, HiPIMS films are largely polycrystalline with random out-of-plane crystallographic orientation, whereas pulsed-DCMS films exhibit a pronounced <100> out-of-plane preferred orientation. These results demonstrate that, beyond composition, thin-film growth conditions and microstructure play a crucial role in governing the photochromic performance of YHO.

AI.tldr: 比较HiPIMS和脉冲DCMS制备的YHO薄膜的光致变色性能，发现脉冲DCMS薄膜具有更高的光致变色对比度和更低的带隙，这归因于其不同的微观结构和成分比。
AI.motivation: 研究不同溅射技术（HiPIMS vs 脉冲DCMS）对YHO薄膜光致变色性能的影响，探索薄膜生长条件和微观结构对光致变色性能的作用机制。
AI.method: 采用反应性高功率脉冲磁控溅射（HiPIMS）和反应性脉冲直流磁控溅射（脉冲DCMS）制备YHO薄膜，通过光学发射光谱分析等离子体特性，测量薄膜的光学、结构和光致变色性能。
AI.result: HiPIMS放电中Y⁺离子占主导，而脉冲DCMS中Ar⁺离子占主导；脉冲DCMS薄膜的光致变色对比度（34%）显著高于HiPIMS薄膜（9%），且带隙更低（2.70 eV vs 2.94 eV）；HiPIMS薄膜为多晶随机取向，而脉冲DCMS薄膜具有明显的<100>择优取向。
AI.conclusion: 除了化学成分外，薄膜的生长条件和微观结构对YHO的光致变色性能起着关键作用，脉冲DCMS技术能制备出性能更优的光致变色YHO薄膜。

title: Extended Ashkin-Teller transition in two coupled frustrated Haldane chains
summary: We report an extremely rich ground state phase diagram of two spin-1 Haldane chains frustrated with a three-site exchange and coupled by the antiferromagnetic Heisenberg interaction on a zig-zag ladder. A particular feature of the phase diagram is the extended quantum phase transition in the Ashkin-Teller universality class that separates the plaquette phase, which spontaneously breaks translation symmetry, and the uniform disordered phase. The former is connected to the Haldane phase, stabilized by large inter-chain coupling, via the topological Gaussian transition. Upon decreasing the inter-chain interactions, this intermediate disorder phase vanishes, giving place to a dimerized phase separated from the plaquette phase on one side via a non-magnetic Ising transition and from the Haldane phase on the other side by a topological weak first-order transition. Finally, in the limit of two decoupled chains, we recover a quantum critical point that corresponds to two copies of the Wess-Zumino-Witten $\mathrm{SU(2)}_2$ criticality with a total central charge $c=3$.

AI.tldr: 研究两条自旋1 Haldane链在三维交换阻挫和反铁磁海森堡相互作用下，在之字形梯子上的丰富基态相图，包含多种量子相变和拓扑相变。
AI.motivation: 探索阻挫自旋链系统中的复杂量子相图，特别是研究Haldane相、plaquette相、无序相和dimerized相之间的相变行为，以及拓扑相变和量子临界点。
AI.method: 研究两条自旋1 Haldane链，引入三维交换阻挫和反铁磁海森堡相互作用，构建之字形梯子模型，分析其基态相图。
AI.result: 发现丰富的基态相图，包含：1）Plaquette相和均匀无序相之间的Ashkin-Teller普适类量子相变；2）Haldane相和Plaquette相之间的拓扑高斯相变；3）Dimerized相和Plaquette相之间的非磁性Ising相变；4）Haldane相和Dimerized相之间的拓扑弱一级相变；5）两条解耦链时恢复总中心荷c=3的WZW SU(2)₂临界点。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了阻挫自旋链系统中复杂的量子相图和多种相变类型，包括拓扑相变、量子临界点和不同普适类相变，为理解强关联量子系统的相变行为提供了重要见解。

title: Chalcogen Impurity Barriers in 2D Systems via Semi-Empirical/Machine Learning Modeling: A Survey over 4000 Materials
summary: Adequate characterization of two-dimensional materials with low energy barriers for impurity adsorption is key for advancing applications based on catalysis, sensing, and surface functionalization. However, first-principles methods, such as DFT, are often computationally extremely expensive for feasible large-scale screenings. Given such a scenario, we address a data-driven approach which integrates the semi-empirical Extended Huckel Method with machine learning techniques to estimate adsorption energy barriers in the case of three relevant chalcogen impurities, S, Se and Te. With this aim, we consider the 4036 2D materials found in the C2DB. The scheme employs the EHM to compute energy profiles along three in-plane migration paths, from which average barriers can be derived. The equilibrium distance between the impurity and the 2D surface is not calculated from a tie-consuming geometry optimization. Instead, it is estimated from a simple effective phenomenological expression. Physicochemical descriptors are then obtained from the Matminer library for curated features. Four different ML models are tested, with the XGBoost leading to the highest performance. We further use SHAP to verify the resulting predictions, focusing on the $\sim1,500$ materials displaying the lowest barrier values. As it could be anticipated, we establish that the average valence electron count, electronegativity, and atomic number are typically the most relevant attributes to validate the ML model. But we also are able to determine, for the different chalcogen atoms, which other few descriptors likewise considerably influence the adsorption properties. Our results show that when combined with interpretable ML protocols, EHM can produce a scalable framework for choosing 2D structures that exhibit the desired capture/release dynamics pertinent in a variety of utilization.

AI.tldr: 结合半经验扩展休克尔方法与机器学习，开发可扩展框架预测二维材料中硫、硒、碲杂质的吸附能垒，用于高通量筛选低能垒材料。
AI.motivation: 二维材料中杂质吸附能垒的表征对于催化、传感和表面功能化应用至关重要，但传统第一性原理方法（如DFT）计算成本过高，难以进行大规模筛选。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动方法，结合半经验扩展休克尔方法（EHM）和机器学习技术。使用C2DB数据库中的4036种二维材料，通过EHM计算三个平面内迁移路径的能量分布，从简单有效现象学表达式估计平衡距离，使用Matminer库获取物理化学描述符，测试四种ML模型（XGBoost表现最佳），并利用SHAP进行预测解释。
AI.result: XGBoost模型表现最佳，成功识别约1500种具有最低能垒值的材料。平均价电子数、电负性和原子数是最相关的特征，同时确定了不同硫族元素的其他重要描述符。
AI.conclusion: 结合可解释的机器学习协议，扩展休克尔方法可以构建可扩展框架，用于筛选具有理想捕获/释放动力学的二维材料，适用于多种应用场景。

title: Magnetic order and excitations in Ce$_3$TiBi$_5$ and Ce$_3$ZrBi$_5$
summary: The R3MBi5 rare-earth intermetallics (R = rare earth, M = Ti, Zr, Sc) provide a versatile platform to explore how Kondo hybridization, RKKY exchange, magnetic frustration, and broken inversion symmetry may cooperate to generate unusual magnetic behavior. We present a comprehensive neutron scattering investigation of the magnetic structure, crystal electric field (CEF), and low-energy excitations in the locally noncentrosymmetric Kondo-lattice compounds Ce3TiBi5 and Ce3ZrBi5. Powder and single-crystal neutron diffraction reveals incommensurate cycloidal antiferromagnetic order in Ce3TiBi5 with propagation vector k = (0, 0, 0.388) and a reduced ordered moment of m = 0.53(3)$μ_{B}$. Ce3ZrBi5 exhibits a qualitatively similar magnetic diffraction profile, with k $\simeq$ (0, 0, 0.37). Inelastic neutron scattering measurements resolve two clear, well-separated CEF excitations in both compounds with nearly the same profile, confirming a well-isolated Kramers doublet ground state. At low energies, a broad, quasi-elastic magnetic response is observed at T $\simeq$ TN, whose momentum-dependence is inconsistent with that expected from conventional collective excitations of localized moments. This discrepancy, along with a Kondo temperature estimate TK ~ 3--5 K -- comparable to TN -- indicates sizable Kondo hybridization, which accounts for the moment reduction and the spiral magnetic order that appears to involve the magnetic hard direction. Our results place these compounds in a regime where local inversion symmetry breaking, anisotropic CEF effects, and competing Kondo and RKKY interactions collectively give rise to unconventional magnetic order.

AI.tldr: Ce3TiBi5和Ce3ZrBi5中Kondo杂化、RKKY交换和局域非中心对称性共同导致非常规螺旋反铁磁序
AI.motivation: 探索R3MBi5稀土金属间化合物中Kondo杂化、RKKY交换、磁阻挫和破缺反演对称性如何协同产生非常规磁行为
AI.method: 使用粉末和单晶中子衍射研究磁结构，通过非弹性中子散射测量晶体电场激发和低能激发
AI.result: 发现Ce3TiBi5具有传播矢量k=(0,0,0.388)的非公度螺旋反铁磁序，有序磁矩降低至0.53μB；Ce3ZrBi5有类似磁结构；确认了Kramers双重态基态；观察到与局域磁矩集体激发不符的低能准弹性响应
AI.conclusion: 这些化合物处于局域反演对称性破缺、各向异性晶体电场效应以及Kondo和RKKY相互作用竞争共同导致非常规磁序的物理区域

title: Mechanistic Insights into Li+ Transport Enabled by Isolated Sulfur Species in Li3PS4 Glasses
summary: All-solid-state lithium-ion batteries have renewed interest in high-performance solid electrolytes. Li3PS4 (Li2S-P2S5) glasses are among the most studied due to their high ionic conductivity, traditionally ascribed to rotational motion of polyhedral units facilitating Li+ migration. Using ab initio molecular dynamics, we investigate Li-ion diffusion in Li3PS4 glass, demonstrating that our structural model reproduces experimental neutron and X-ray diffraction patterns and conductivity measurements. Importantly, we identify a previously unrecognized diffusion mechanism: Li+ ions near isolated sulfur species (Sn with n = 1, 3) display significantly enhanced mobility, with atomic displacements up to 1.7 greater than those associated with bulkier polyhedral units. These results highlight the critical role of free sulfur species in promoting fast ionic transport, providing insights for the rational design of glass compositions with optimized conductivity for solid-state battery applications

AI.tldr: 研究发现Li3PS4玻璃电解质中，靠近孤立硫物种（S1、S3）的锂离子迁移率显著增强，揭示了游离硫在促进快速离子传输中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 全固态锂离子电池需要高性能固体电解质。Li3PS4玻璃因其高离子电导率而被广泛研究，传统上认为其高电导率源于多面体单元的旋转运动促进锂离子迁移，但具体机制仍需深入理解。
AI.method: 采用从头算分子动力学方法研究Li3PS4玻璃中的锂离子扩散，构建的结构模型能够重现实验中的中子和X射线衍射图谱以及电导率测量结果。
AI.result: 发现了一个先前未被识别的扩散机制：靠近孤立硫物种（Sn，其中n=1,3）的锂离子显示出显著增强的迁移率，其原子位移比与较大多面体单元相关的位移高出1.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 游离硫物种在促进快速离子传输中起着关键作用，这为合理设计具有优化电导率的玻璃组成以用于固态电池应用提供了重要见解。

title: Influence of Hydrogen on Dislocation Relaxation in BCC Iron: Atomistic Mechanisms and Implications
summary: In this study, the influence of pure dislocation and hydrogen-dislocation interactions on anelastic response or internal friction relaxation peaks in bcc-iron was investigated. These relaxations are primarily governed by thermally activated kink nucleation and kink migration events. An atomistic multiscale framework, coupling molecular dynamics (MD) and kinetic Monte Carlo (KMC) simulations, was developed to investigate the underlying atomistic mechanisms behind dislocation-relaxation peaks. MD simulations revealed that the presence of hydrogen atoms near the dislocation core facilitates the kink nucleation process by reducing the nucleation barrier while enhancing the barrier for dislocation migration. The KMC model captured Snoek-Koster peaks arising from the Cottrell atmosphere formed by hydrogen atoms and clusters around the dislocation core, providing insights into the atomistic mechanisms controlling these relaxations. Furthermore, the proposed computational scheme elucidated a unique linear relationship between hydrogen content and the internal friction loss factor, offering a methodology for hydrogen detection and quantification.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多尺度模拟方法，揭示了氢原子对bcc-铁中位错弛豫峰的影响机制，发现氢能促进扭折成核但阻碍位错迁移，并建立了氢含量与内摩擦损耗因子的线性关系。
AI.motivation: 研究纯位错以及氢-位错相互作用对bcc-铁中内摩擦弛豫峰的影响机制，这些弛豫峰主要由热激活的扭折成核和扭折迁移事件控制。
AI.method: 开发了结合分子动力学（MD）和动力学蒙特卡洛（KMC）模拟的多尺度原子框架。MD模拟研究氢原子在位错核心附近对扭折成核和迁移的影响，KMC模型捕捉由氢原子和团簇形成的Cottrell大气引起的Snoek-Koster峰。
AI.result: MD模拟显示氢原子能降低扭折成核势垒但增加位错迁移势垒；KMC模型成功捕捉了Snoek-Koster弛豫峰；建立了氢含量与内摩擦损耗因子之间的线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 该计算方案阐明了氢原子对位错弛豫峰的原子机制影响，提出的氢含量与内摩擦损耗因子的线性关系为氢检测和定量分析提供了新方法。

title: Highly Efficient Second/Third Harmonic Generation in van der Waals Layered Material AgScP2S6 with Anisotropic Polarization and Temperature Dependence
summary: Single-crystal X-ray diffraction and nonlinear optical measurements, especially second- and third-harmonic generation (SHG/THG) are comprehensively investigated for the van der Waals layered material AgScP2S6 with a non-centrosymmetric P31c (159) space group. Linear optical constants are extracted using spectroscopic ellipsometry and applied in fitting the harmonic generation behavior. Polarization-resolved SHG and THG measurements exhibit pronounced anisotropy, with emission patterns well-described by theoretical models derived from the khi(2) and khi(3) tensor elements. The material demonstrates exceptionally high nonlinear susceptibilities, with khi(2) ~ 10^(-8) m/V and khi(3) ~ 10^(-17) m^2/V^2 which is a few orders of magnitude greater than comparable 2D materials reported in the literature. Temperature-dependent SHG and THG measurements from 300 K to 25 K reveal exponential decay in harmonic signal intensities, attributed to reduced carrier mobility, with no evidence of structural phase transitions, consistent with results from single crystal diffraction and heat capacity measurements. Polarization-resolved SHG and THG measurements also reveal distinct orientation and ellipticity trends, highlighting the anisotropic nonlinear tensor contributions and contrasting polarization selection rules in the material. These results establish AgScP2S6 as a high-performance, thermally stable, and highly anisotropic nonlinear candidate material suitable for compact photonic applications such as ultrafast optical modulators, polarization-sensitive detectors, and wavelength-tunable light sources.

AI.tldr: AgScP2S6是一种具有高非线性光学性能的二维层状材料，其二阶和三阶非线性系数比同类材料高几个数量级，且具有显著的各向异性和热稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究AgScP2S6的非线性光学特性，探索其在紧凑光子器件中的应用潜力，如超快光调制器、偏振敏感探测器和波长可调光源。
AI.method: 采用单晶X射线衍射确定晶体结构（P31c空间群），通过光谱椭圆偏振仪提取线性光学常数，进行偏振分辨的二阶和三阶谐波产生测量，并进行温度依赖性的谐波信号分析。
AI.result: 材料表现出极高的非线性系数（χ(2) ~ 10^(-8) m/V，χ(3) ~ 10^(-17) m^2/V^2），比文献报道的同类2D材料高几个数量级。谐波信号强度随温度降低呈指数衰减，但无结构相变证据。偏振测量显示明显的各向异性。
AI.conclusion: AgScP2S6是一种高性能、热稳定且高度各向异性的非线性光学材料，适用于紧凑光子应用，包括超快光调制器、偏振敏感探测器和波长可调光源。

title: Tracking the Lithiation State of Li$_x$Si from Machine-Learned XPS Binding Energies
summary: X-ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy (XPS) is a powerful technique to probe chemical states and interfacial processes in battery materials, but a quantitative interpretation is often hindered by the complex, heterogeneous microstructures that form during operation and dominate electrochemical cycling. Silicon based anodes represent a paradigmatic example in Li batteries, as (de)lithiation proceeds through the formation of strongly disordered Li$_x$Si phases and crystal-amorphous transformations that are hard to characterize. Here, we introduce a computational framework that combines machine-learning (ML) prediction of core-level binding energies to large-scale atomistic simulations -- Grand Canonical Monte Carlo (GCMC) complemented with molecular dynamics (MD), driven by a ML potential -- for a systematic sampling of lithiation states and local atomic environments. This approach yields stoichiometry maps that match the characteristic experimental trends observed in operando and ex situ XPS measurements, including the distinctive Si $2p$ spectroscopic signatures associated with the crystal-to-amorphous disordering driving early delithiation.

AI.tldr: 开发结合机器学习预测核心能级结合能与大规模原子模拟的计算框架，用于硅基负极锂化状态的系统采样，匹配实验XPS观测趋势
AI.motivation: XPS是探测电池材料化学状态和界面过程的有力技术，但电池运行中形成的复杂异质微结构阻碍了定量解释。硅基负极在锂电池中具有代表性，其（脱）锂化过程通过形成强无序Li$_x$Si相和晶体-非晶转变进行，这些过程难以表征。
AI.method: 引入结合机器学习预测核心能级结合能与大规模原子模拟的计算框架：使用机器学习势驱动的巨正则蒙特卡洛（GCMC）和分子动力学（MD），对锂化状态和局部原子环境进行系统采样。
AI.result: 该方法产生的化学计量图与实验观测的XPS趋势匹配，包括与早期脱锂驱动的晶体-非晶无序化相关的特征性Si 2p光谱特征。
AI.conclusion: 该计算框架能够系统表征硅基负极锂化过程中的复杂相变和光谱特征，为电池材料的XPS定量解释提供了有力工具。

title: Machine Learning for Electron-phonon Interactions From Finite Difference
summary: First-principles investigations of electron-phonon interactions (EPIs) play a crucial role in understanding a wide range of phenomena in physics and materials science. Among various approaches, the finite difference method offers a direct route to capture higher-order EPIs and is compatible with diverse electronic structure solvers. However, its considerable computational cost limits its broader application. To overcome this bottleneck, we present a machine learning electron-phonon interaction (MLEPI) pipeline that predicts force constants and electronic Hamiltonians for modeling EPIs from finite difference calculations, improving efficiency by orders of magnitude without compromising accuracy. The performance of MLEPI is validated by studying the temperature dependence of the electronic band properties in bilayer graphene, where both first- and second order EPIs are treated on an equal footing. Using a heterogeneous edge network, the pipeline integrates both interlayer and intralayer interactions, making it particularly suitable for studying multilayer materials. With its inherent adaptability and ease of transfer to other applications, our methodology provides a robust tool with a very favorable accuracy/efficiency balance for investigating EPIs in large-scale material systems.

AI.tldr: 提出机器学习电子-声子相互作用（MLEPI）管道，通过预测力常数和电子哈密顿量，将有限差分法计算效率提升数个数量级，用于研究多层材料中的电子-声子相互作用。
AI.motivation: 有限差分法虽然能直接捕获高阶电子-声子相互作用且兼容多种电子结构求解器，但其计算成本过高限制了广泛应用。需要开发更高效的方法来研究大规模材料系统中的电子-声子相互作用。
AI.method: 提出MLEPI机器学习管道，通过预测力常数和电子哈密顿量来建模电子-声子相互作用。使用异质边缘网络集成层内和层间相互作用，特别适用于多层材料研究。该方法保持与有限差分法相同的精度但效率大幅提升。
AI.result: MLEPI将计算效率提升了数个数量级而不损失精度。通过研究双层石墨烯中电子能带性质的温度依赖性验证了性能，能够同时处理一阶和二阶电子-声子相互作用。异质边缘网络成功集成了层内和层间相互作用。
AI.conclusion: MLEPI方法提供了准确性与效率之间非常有利的平衡，为研究大规模材料系统中的电子-声子相互作用提供了强大工具。该方法具有固有的适应性和易于转移到其他应用的特性。

title: Landau level spectroscopy in current solid state physics
comment: 18 pages, 14 figures, to be published in Contemporary Physics
summary: Landau level spectroscopy plays an important role in modern condensed-matter physics. In this technique, electrons in a solid are subjected to quantizing magnetic fields and probed experimentally, often through optical methods. Direct and detailed insights into the electronic properties of crystalline materials are obtained, particularly the properties related to their band structure. Landau level spectroscopy enables the precise extraction of key parameters such as effective mass, carrier density, mobility, and band gap, and serves as a powerful tool for studying interactions between electrons and other quasiparticles in solids. Over its more than seventy-year history, Landau level spectroscopy has been applied mainly to semiconductors and semimetals. Today, its scope also includes graphene-based systems, surface and bulk states in topological materials, and other emergent systems with a narrow or vanishing band gap. In this work, we review the fundamentals of Landau level spectroscopy and illustrate them with selected examples from the literature.

AI.tldr: 朗道能级光谱学综述：介绍基本原理及其在半导体、石墨烯、拓扑材料等系统中的现代应用
AI.motivation: 朗道能级光谱学是现代凝聚态物理中的重要技术，通过在量子化磁场中探测电子能级，可以直接深入了解晶体材料的电子性质，特别是能带结构相关特性。该技术已有七十多年历史，最初主要应用于半导体和半金属，现在已扩展到石墨烯、拓扑材料等新兴系统。
AI.method: 这是一篇综述性论文，回顾了朗道能级光谱学的基本原理，并通过文献中的精选示例进行说明。该方法涉及在量子化磁场中对固体中的电子进行实验探测，通常通过光学方法实现。
AI.result: 朗道能级光谱学能够精确提取有效质量、载流子密度、迁移率和带隙等关键参数，是研究固体中电子与其他准粒子相互作用的强大工具。该技术已成功应用于半导体、半金属、石墨烯系统、拓扑材料的表面和体态，以及其他具有窄带隙或零带隙的新兴系统。
AI.conclusion: 朗道能级光谱学作为一种成熟而强大的实验技术，在凝聚态物理中持续发挥着重要作用。随着其应用范围从传统半导体扩展到石墨烯、拓扑材料等新兴系统，该技术将继续为理解复杂电子系统的能带结构和相互作用提供关键见解。

title: Engineering in-plane anisotropy in 2D materials via surface-bound ligands
summary: 2D materials exhibiting in-plane anisotropy enable novel functionality in electronic, optoelectronic, and photonic devices, yet their availability is generally limited to naturally-occurring low-symmetry van der Waals compounds. Here, we demonstrate an approach to structural engineering in a family of blue-emitting 2D silver phenylchalcogenide semiconductors based on steric interactions among surface-bound organic molecular ligands. By strategically halogenating specific sites of phenyl ligands, we demonstrate dramatic changes to the inorganic AgSe plane in mithrene (silver phenylselenolate, AgSePh). Density functional theory revealed pronounced in-plane electronic anisotropy for direct-gap fluorinated derivatives, while a chlorinated variant exhibited a direct-to-indirect bandgap transition. Furthermore, some fluorinated variants displayed strongly polarized absorption and luminescence, accompanied by a 10x enhancement in photoluminescence quantum yield. This work establishes a versatile approach for tailoring optoelectronic properties in hybrid semiconductors that is difficult or impossible to achieve in all-inorganic materials alone, offering new opportunities in advanced material design.

AI.tldr: 通过卤化苯配体调控二维银苯基硫属化物半导体结构，实现面内电子各向异性、带隙类型转变和发光性能增强
AI.motivation: 现有面内各向异性二维材料主要限于天然低对称性范德华化合物，需要开发通用方法来调控材料结构和光电性能
AI.method: 在银苯基硒化物（mithrene）中，通过卤化苯配体特定位点，利用表面有机分子配体间的空间相互作用进行结构工程调控
AI.result: 氟化衍生物表现出明显的面内电子各向异性，氯化变体出现直接到间接带隙转变，部分氟化变体显示强偏振吸收和发光，光致发光量子产率提高10倍
AI.conclusion: 建立了一种在杂化半导体中调控光电性能的通用方法，为先进材料设计提供新机遇

title: Accounting for the length-scale dependence of thermal diffusivity in 3C-SiC measured with transient thermal gratings
summary: Pump-probe optical methods like transient grating spectroscopy (TGS) enable rapid, nondestructive thermoelastic property measurements. But, in phonon-dominated ceramics, they can underpredict bulk thermal diffusivity when long mean free path (MFP) phonons do not equilibrate over experimental length scales. We combine in situ TGS with Si4+ ion irradiation of CVD 3C-SiC (300 and 550C, 0.5-1 dpa) and density functional theory informed Boltzmann transport equation solutions to understand the origins of this offset. We show how the discrepancy between laser flash analysis (LFA) and TGS-measured thermal diffusivity varies with grain-boundary density, temperature, and defect concentration. We introduce a dimensionless suppression factor that accounts for this discrepancy and demonstrate its utility by using it to show an agreement between the thermal defect resistance of neutron irradiated 3C-SiC (measured using LFA) and ion irradiated 3C-SiC (measured using TGS). This theory-informed experimental framework enables quantitative, in situ tracking of ion irradiation damage induced thermal transport degradation in ceramics.

AI.tldr: 结合原位瞬态光栅光谱与离子辐照实验，通过理论模型解释并修正了陶瓷材料中长平均自由程声子导致的体热扩散系数测量偏差。
AI.motivation: 传统泵浦探测光学方法（如瞬态光栅光谱）在测量声子主导的陶瓷材料时，由于长平均自由程声子在实验尺度上未达到平衡，会低估体热扩散系数。需要理解这种偏差的物理起源并建立修正方法。
AI.method: 1) 对CVD 3C-SiC进行Si4+离子辐照（300-550°C，0.5-1 dpa）并同步进行原位瞬态光栅光谱测量；2) 结合密度泛函理论计算的玻尔兹曼输运方程求解；3) 引入无量纲抑制因子来量化测量偏差；4) 将激光闪光分析与瞬态光栅光谱结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 揭示了激光闪光分析与瞬态光栅光谱测量热扩散系数之间的差异随晶界密度、温度和缺陷浓度的变化规律。通过抑制因子修正后，中子辐照3C-SiC（激光闪光分析测量）与离子辐照3C-SiC（瞬态光栅光谱测量）的热缺陷电阻结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 建立了理论指导的实验框架，能够定量、原位追踪离子辐照损伤引起的陶瓷热输运性能退化，为陶瓷材料在极端环境下的热管理性能评估提供了可靠方法。

title: Molecular Beam Epitaxy Growth of Wafer-scale SnSe van der Waals Ultrathin Layers
summary: Tin selenide (SnSe) is a van der Waals (vdW) layered post-transition metal monochalcogenide compound which is promising for a wide range of device applications when its thickness is reduced to a few layers. Hence, developing a mature synthesis technique to obtain wafer-scale, high-quality ultrathin SnSe layers is crucial. In this work, we present a comprehensive study on the effect of growth parameters on the material quality of ultrathin SnSe thin films grown by molecular beam epitaxy. A growth window including substrate temperature of 210-270°C and low Se/Sn flux ratio with Se valve position of 10-30 mils has been identified which results in SnSe films with root-mean-square (RMS) roughness as low as 0.6 nm and full-width-at-half-maximum (FWHM) of 0.1° in SnSe (400) x-ray diffraction (XRD) rocking curve. Finally, using a three-step growth approach, we demonstrate wafer-scale coalesced ultrathin SnSe layers with thicknesses from 20 nm down to 5 nm, with good crystallinity, structural quality, and surface morphology. This work establishes a growth condition framework for MBE-grown SnSe and presents a viable route for developing wafer-scale single-layer films, unlocking the potential of this highly promising material for advanced device integration.

AI.tldr: 该研究确定了分子束外延生长超薄SnSe薄膜的最佳生长参数窗口，并采用三步生长法实现了晶圆级、高质量的超薄SnSe层生长。
AI.motivation: SnSe是一种有前景的vdW层状材料，在减薄至几层时具有广泛器件应用潜力。开发成熟的合成技术以获得晶圆级、高质量的超薄SnSe层至关重要。
AI.method: 通过分子束外延生长超薄SnSe薄膜，系统研究生长参数对材料质量的影响。确定了最佳生长窗口（衬底温度210-270°C，低Se/Sn通量比），并采用三步生长法。
AI.result: 获得了RMS粗糙度低至0.6 nm、XRD摇摆曲线FWHM为0.1°的高质量SnSe薄膜。成功实现了厚度从20 nm到5 nm的晶圆级合并超薄SnSe层，具有良好的结晶性、结构质量和表面形貌。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了MBE生长SnSe的生长条件框架，为开发晶圆级单层薄膜提供了可行途径，释放了这种极具前景材料在先进器件集成中的潜力。
